statusLine.command: bash -lc 'input=$(cat); MODEL=$(echo "$input" | jq -r ".model.display_name"); DIR=$(echo "$input" | jq -r ".workspace.current_dir"); PCT_RAW=$(echo "$input" | jq -r ".context_window.used_percentage // empty"); PCT=${PCT_RAW%%.*}; PCT=${PCT:-0}; CYAN=$(printf "\033[36m"); BLUE=$(printf "\033[34m"); GREEN=$(printf "\033[32m"); YELLOW=$(printf "\033[33m"); RED=$(printf "\033[31m"); MAGENTA=$(printf "\033[35m"); RESET=$(printf "\033[0m"); if [ "$PCT" -ge 90 ]; then BAR_COLOR="$RED"; elif [ "$PCT" -ge 70 ]; then BAR_COLOR="$YELLOW"; else BAR_COLOR="$GREEN"; fi; FILLED=$((PCT / 10)); EMPTY=$((10 - FILLED)); BAR=$(printf "%${FILLED}s" | tr " " "#")$(printf "%${EMPTY}s" | tr " " "-"); BRANCH=""; if GIT_OPTIONAL_LOCKS=0 git -c core.fsmonitor=false rev-parse --git-dir > /dev/null 2>&1; then GIT_BRANCH=$(GIT_OPTIONAL_LOCKS=0 git -c core.fsmonitor=false branch --show-current 2>/dev/null); [ -n "$GIT_BRANCH" ] && BRANCH=" ${MAGENTA}${GIT_BRANCH}${RESET}"; fi; CONDA_INFO=""; if [ -n "$CONDA_DEFAULT_ENV" ] && [ "$CONDA_DEFAULT_ENV" != "base" ]; then CONDA_INFO=" ${BLUE}(${CONDA_DEFAULT_ENV})${RESET}"; fi; USER_NAME=$(whoami); SHORT_DIR="${DIR##*/}"; printf "${CYAN}%s${RESET}  ${YELLOW}%s${RESET}%b%b\n" "$USER_NAME" "$SHORT_DIR" "$BRANCH" "$CONDA_INFO"; printf "${CYAN}[%s]${RESET}  ${BAR_COLOR}%s${RESET} %s%%\n" "$MODEL" "$BAR" "$PCT"'
